{{Infobox concept
| name = Zenith Era alloys
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]]'s alloys are [[Zenith Era alloys]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17">''The Engineer'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax can punch through [[Zenith Era alloys]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c23">''The Knight'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zenith Era alloys]] do not bend under [[Sola]]'s strike.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30">''The Pilot'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
